notes: Suite 12 tests span Chrome, Safari, Firefox, Edge, cross-browser, mobile devices, resolutions, and OS combinations. Running on Edge (Chromium), only Edge-specific tests, cross-browser visual/layout/animation tests, viewport/resolution tests, and OS-Windows tests were directly executable. Safari (macOS/iOS), Firefox, Chrome Android, and physical device tests were SKIPPED as not applicable to Edge-only execution. All executable tests PASSED.

testResults.title: Chrome Desktop - Full Flow
testResults.reason: Chrome-specific test; not applicable when running Edge browser. Edge full flow tested in BROWSER-EDGE-001.

testResults.title: Chrome Desktop - Map Features
testResults.reason: Chrome-specific test. Map functionality not available in this store configuration.

testResults.title: Chrome Android - Mobile Flow
testResults.reason: Requires physical Android device or emulator. Not applicable on Edge desktop.

testResults.title: Chrome Android - Touch Events
testResults.reason: Requires physical Android device. Touch events cannot be tested on desktop Edge.

testResults.title: Safari Desktop - Full Flow
testResults.reason: Safari requires macOS. Not available on Windows 11.

testResults.title: Safari Desktop - Map Features
testResults.reason: Safari requires macOS. Not available on Windows 11.

testResults.title: Safari iOS - Mobile Flow
testResults.reason: Requires physical iPhone. Not available on Windows 11.

testResults.title: Safari iOS - Touch and Gestures
testResults.reason: Requires physical iPhone. Not available on Windows 11.

testResults.title: Firefox Desktop - Full Flow
testResults.reason: Firefox-specific test; assigned to playwright-firefox server in other suite runs.

testResults.title: Firefox Desktop - Form Handling
testResults.reason: Firefox-specific test. Form handling verified on Edge instead.

details.homepage: PASS - Loads correctly at 1920x1080, no console errors, hero slider renders, navigation bar complete with 15 menu items, search bar functional, all header elements (language, currency, ship-to, account menu) visible and interactive
details.catalog: PASS - Category page renders 28 results in 4-column grid, sidebar filters (price, categories, brand, flavor, vintage, type, year, weight, date, expires) all present, breadcrumbs correct, sort and view toggle controls work
details.search: PASS - Autocomplete dropdown shows categories and products within 2s. Full search results page returns 7 results for 'beer' with grid layout, filters, sort controls
details.cart: PASS - Empty cart state renders correctly with 'Continue shopping' and 'Add with bulk order' CTAs, 'Saved for later' and 'Recently browsed' sections visible
details.dashboard: PASS - Account dashboard renders with latest orders table, monthly spend report chart, order status, sidebar navigation (Purchasing/Marketing/Corporate/User sections)
details.consoleErrors: 0 errors on homepage, 0 on dashboard, 2 failed image resources on catalog page (Gin Tonic Cherry Soda images - server-side 404, not browser-specific)
details.jsCompatibility: PASS - No JavaScript errors, GraphQL API calls all return 200, Google Analytics tracking functional

testResults.title: Edge Desktop - PDF/Print
testResults.details: No dedicated print or PDF generation functionality found in the current storefront. Order pages and invoices render correctly. Edge print preview accessible via browser shortcut. No Edge-specific rendering issues observed.

details.fontRendering: Lato, sans-serif renders correctly across all tested viewports
details.spacing: Consistent padding and margins across header, navigation, content, and footer
details.colors: Brown/gold theme (Coffee preset) renders correctly - header bar, navigation, buttons all match expected palette
details.layout: No visual anomalies or CSS rendering issues on Edge Chromium
details.note: Full cross-browser comparison requires Chrome and Firefox screenshots from other suite runs. Edge rendering baseline captured.

details.modalAnimations: PASS - Ship-to dropdown, language selector, and 'Add to list' dialog all open/close with smooth transitions
details.sliderTransitions: PASS - Homepage hero slider and product image carousels animate smoothly
details.cssAnimations: 6 active CSS animations detected on homepage
details.performance: No jerky or stuttering behavior observed in Edge

details.overflowIssues: Minor expected overflow in swiper-wrapper (carousel by design) and facet-filter titles (text truncation by design)

testResults.title: Mobile Matrix - iPhone Models
testResults.reason: Requires physical iPhone devices or BrowserStack. Not available in current Edge desktop session.

testResults.title: Mobile Matrix - Android Models
testResults.reason: Requires physical Android devices or BrowserStack. Not available in current Edge desktop session.

details.320px: PASS - Layout adapts correctly, hamburger menu visible, no horizontal overflow, content fits
details.375px: PASS - Standard mobile layout, condensed header, single-column product cards, touch targets adequate
details.414px: PASS - Slightly wider mobile layout, similar to 375px with more breathing room
details.768px_tablet: PASS - 3-column product grid, hamburger menu, larger slider images, footer columns reorganize
details.1366px_laptop: PASS - Full desktop layout, all navigation items visible, search bar expanded
details.1920px_fhd: PASS - Baseline desktop layout, 4-column grid, full navigation with all 15 menu items
details.2560px_qhd: PASS - Content centered, no stretching, all elements scale appropriately, text readable
details.horizontalScroll: No unwanted horizontal scrollbar at any tested viewport

details.1366x768: PASS - Common laptop resolution, full desktop UI visible, navigation wraps appropriately
details.1920x1080: PASS - Full HD baseline, optimal layout with all features visible
details.2560x1440: PASS - QHD resolution, content centered with appropriate max-width, no layout stretching
details.note: 4K (3840x2160) not tested due to viewport size limitations; content is expected to behave same as 2560 with more whitespace
details.highDPI: Images use responsive srcset; no visible blurriness at tested resolutions

details.fontRendering: Lato font renders correctly with Windows ClearType
details.networkAPIs: All GraphQL calls succeed (200), Google Analytics tracking works, Builder.io integration functional
details.note: Chrome comparison requires separate Chrome suite run. Edge on Windows 11 shows no OS-specific issues.

testResults.title: macOS - Chrome/Safari
testResults.reason: Requires macOS. Not available on Windows 11.

warnings.description: Two product images return server errors (Gin Tonic Cherry Soda 216x216 and 348x348). This is a data/CDN issue, not browser-specific.
warnings.consoleError: Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of [error] for ThreecentsCherry-Soda images

performanceNotes.pageLoadTime: Fast - homepage loads within 2s on Edge
performanceNotes.graphqlCalls: All return HTTP 200, no errors in response body
performanceNotes.consoleErrors: 0 JS errors across tested pages (homepage, catalog, search, cart, dashboard, contacts)
performanceNotes.networkFailures: Only GA beacon aborts during navigation (expected behavior)
